[Cherry Blossom Festival Commotion Celebration Gift]

Sensei, Blue Archive's first event, "Cherry Blossom Festival Commotion" has been updated!

Check out 1,200 Pyroxenes in your mailbox!
(Can be claimed until 12/06/2021 14:59 PM (UTC))
